## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph. Describe behavior change, not implementation detail. -->

## Why

<!-- Optional. Link the issue this addresses. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new stack, new behavior, or new feature
- [ ] fix — fixes a broken behavior
- [ ] refactor — rearranges code, no behavior change
- [ ] docs — README, CLAUDE.md, in-code comments
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, formatting

## How I tested this

<!-- Smoke commands run, target distros, what you verified. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash -n` passes on every changed `.sh` file.
- [ ] `jq -e .` passes on every changed `manifest.json`.
- [ ] No literal `secret` placeholders or `website.com` hostnames left in YAMLs.
- [ ] Followed [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) conventions for naming, layout, and the quality bar (n8n-level).
- [ ] I'm not being an asshole. ([CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
